pageTitle: GetNiftyKit - Simple, Reliable Free Web Tools
metaDescription: Flag downloads, emoji search, and more — free web tools you can use instantly in your browser, no sign-up required.
heroSubtitle: Free web tools you can use instantly — No sign-up, No install
flagMasterDesc: Search and download flags from 252 countries, completely free
emojiSearchDesc: Search emojis by name and copy them to your clipboard instantly
specialCharDesc: Search special characters like arrows and math symbols by meaning and copy instantly
qrCodeDesc: Create a QR code for a URL, Wi-Fi, business card, or event and download it instantly
passwordGeneratorDesc: Combine uppercase, numbers, and symbols to create a secure random password for free
gradientBuilderDesc: Combine colors and angles to build a CSS gradient live and copy the code
ddayCounterDesc: Enter a target date to see the D-Day count in big numbers and track multiple goals
intervalTimerDesc: Just enter your sets and work/rest times, and it runs the whole session for you
tempoCounterDesc: Enter a BPM and it plays precisely timed beats while counting your reps
pomodoroTimerDesc: Automatically cycles through focus and break time while counting your completed pomodoros
whiteNoiseDesc: White, pink, and brown noise, synthesized right in your browser
flashcardsDesc: Study your own cards in random order
squareCheckDesc: Enter any two sides and the third is calculated automatically
stairCalcDesc: Enter the floor-to-floor height and get the step count, riser, and tread depth instantly
shelfSpacingDesc: Enter the total length and shelf count to get even spacing instantly
clayShrinkageDesc: Enter your target finished size to get the forming size you need
kilnLoadingDesc: Enter your kiln, shelf, and piece sizes to see how many pieces fit in one firing
imageConverterDesc: Upload an image and click the format you want to convert it to PNG, JPG, or WebP instantly
vectorConverterDesc: Upload an image and get a precise black-and-white SVG line art instantly
footerNote: Every tool on this site runs locally in your browser. Your data is never sent to or stored on a server.
